title: 10 best herbal teas for endometriosis
description: Urtica dioica, also known as stinging nettle, teas helps with endometriosis because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The tea's rich content of flavonoids and carotenoids may help alleviate symptoms such as pain and inflammation associated with the condition. Additionally, stinging nettle's ability to regulate hormone production may also contribute to its therapeutic benefits.
